reviews.comment:
El día 4/4 a las 9.00 de la mañana hice el cambio de aceite y filtro de mi auto Fiat Cronos, en la estación de servicio Ruta 202 y Avda de trabajo en Don Torcuato, resulta que cuando controlo el aceite, veo la tapa del compartimiento del filtro de aire levantado, y cuando quiero ajustarlo, los tornillos no ajustan, cuando lo llevo al mecánico me dice que al cerrar, ajustaron mal la tapa y al apretar los tornillos barrieron la rosca y ahora no ajusta la tapa. Volví a ypf boxes y me dijeron que se soluciona poniendo unos tornillos con tuerca, que me invitaron a ir a comprar, o  sea ustedes me rompen un auto con 30.000 mil kilómetros y yo lo tengo que solucionar?

(Translated by Google)
On April 4th at 9:00 a.m. I had the oil and filter changed on my Fiat Cronos at the gas station on Route 202 and Avda de trabajo in Don Torcuato. When I checked the oil, I saw the air filter compartment cover was up, and when I tried to tighten it, the screws didn’t fit. When I took it to the mechanic, he told me that when they closed it, they tightened the cover incorrectly, and when they tightened the screws, they stripped the threads, and now the cover doesn’t fit. I went back to the YPF pit stop and they told me it could be fixed by installing some nuts and bolts. They invited me to go buy them. In other words, you guys are breaking a car with 30,000 kilometers and I have to fix it?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvdWRfNlFREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Great service and cleanliness. The Full is beautiful; you can sit inside or outside. There's an ATM. A great place to hang out with friends or work on your laptop.

reviews.comment:
Me gusta porque tiene terraza, hay enchufes en todos lados para trabajar. Hice cambio de aceite. Almorcé. El boxes me dejó pagar hasta 6 cuotas sin intereses.
Ambiente agradable. Café rico. Gracias 🫂

(Translated by Google)
I like it because it has a terrace and there are electrical outlets everywhere for working. I had my oil changed. I had lunch. The pit stop let me pay up to six interest-free installments.
Pleasant atmosphere. Delicious coffee. Thanks 🫂
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3NE1EaUVnEAE
